violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Inspector provided application. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

A wiping rag and coffee grounds were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine break tray) were observed with pink biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC stated machine was scheduled for cleaning today and took machine out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on service area low boy were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -under prep unit hood -roller carts for refrigeration units -ice bin. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The wall under the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. Inspector observed a hole and broken coving. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The floors under equipment throughout the establishment has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
